<svg viewBox="0 0 1920 1080" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <g id="svg_1">
    <defs>
      <rect id="shape_1" x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="1080" />
    </defs>
    <clipPath id="clip_1">
      <use href="#shape_1"/>
    </clipPath>
    <g clip-path="url(#shape_1)" id="svg_clip_1">
      <image id="svg_img_1" href="data:image/jpeg;base64," x="0" y="0" width="1920" height="1080" preserveAspectRatio="none" />
    </g>
  </g>
  <rect id="svg_2" x="53" y="167" width="670" height="230" fill="#3E2713" transform="rotate(-1.5, 388, 282)" />
  <text id="svg_3" x="85" y="325" fill="#FFFFFF" font-size="110" font-family="NotoSansKR-Bold" transform="rotate(-1.5, 388, 282)">커피의 매력</text>
  <rect id="svg_4" x="90" y="377" width="810" height="545" fill="#F8F4ED" />
  <text id="svg_5" x="125" y="535" fill="#3E2713" font-size="135" font-family="GmarketSansTTFBold">Discover the</text>
  <text id="svg_6" x="125" y="700" fill="#3E2713" font-size="135" font-family="GmarketSansTTFBold">Flavor of</text>
  <text id="svg_7" x="125" y="865" fill="#3E2713" font-size="135" font-family="GmarketSansTTFBold">Our Coffee</text>
</svg>
